reviews.review_text: We found our site too small.  We were not able to put our awning out as it would have hit our car (which we parked on our site but it was almost in the drain) & any further, the door would have hit the caravan next door.  Outlook was magnificent. Facilities were immaculately clean.

We have sought garaging for our van for many months,and through a friend, found the Stansbury Caravan Park. Great location, excellent facilities that are well maintained, but most importantly, a couple of park managers who are the most friendly,  hardworking, and accommodating people we have met in our many travels. All our questions answered promptly, our needs addessed,and concerns allayed. We have now booked ahead for many stays and can't wait to return
Leah and John.
Very tidy amenities and nice well maintained grounds. Staff were very friendly and helpful with local knowledge of attractions and things to do.
Great bunch of people keeping the Park clean and tidy. Ambience is great. We keep coming back.we’re locals now kind off. Love the place and the people, see you soon.😘
We stayed there for the last week. Our two cats loved it. Anita, Ash and the staff are awesome.  Nothing is to much trouble.
Enjoyed our stay in the waterfront cabins. Peaceful and scenic location and excellent service.
Lovely well kept parks with exceptionally clean amenities
Had a beautiful site on the foreshore which was great

Had a lovely stay overlooking the water on sunny days around 20 degrees.
Also special mention to the friendly and very helpful staff.
4 vans stayed we had a great time facilities excellent great park 10/10.

Third stay here, nice cabins, overlooking the ocean, well priced and spotlessly clean, as indeed is the entire park and its facilities. Always pleasant staff and a five minute walk to arguably the best pub meals on the Yorke Peninsular (Dalrympal Hotel)
Was booked into a beachside powered site. The view is just spectacular. Amenities are very clean and modern and the service is a standout. Will be back again for a longer stay next time

A beautiful caravan park situated right on the beach. With green lawns, clean amenities and helpful friendly staff.
Dog and kid friendly being an added bonus.
Lovely park. Clean and great layout. So great to have a beachside site and we were able to fish off the beach. Staff in reception were so friendly and helpful. We will be back with family. Thank you
We stayed at the non powered sites. The sites, camp kitchen and bathrooms were all tidy and clean. Would definitely recommend.
Lovely caravan park. Reception staff great and very helpful. Spectacular ocean views and can fish off the beach. Felt very safe to stay here. Very welcoming locals
Loved every minute of our stay in the 3br deluxe villa...it was spotlessly clean and well equipped.   It was very quiet and we really came away relaxed.  Would very happily stay again.
Absolutely loved it here, I’ll definitely come back. The staff and grounds are amazing, thank you.
Fabulous beachside cabins with top class facilities in a great seaside country town.
Lovely caravan park, situated in an idea location to stroll into town, great facilities and so well kept, definitely recommend it to all travelers

Meet warmly by the host at this perfectly located caravan park.with large concert can pads to park on.spotkess amenities complete with a very well fitted out kitchen and 2 undercover bbqs. The  lounge room had a decent size TV .

In February I loved my blissful 8 days in the Stansbury Foreshore Caravan Park. The amenities are always immaculate. Anita, Ash and Gail are again so friendly and helpful.
This was a solo working getaway with plenty of walks on the beach and into town for coffee.
I stay 3-4 times every year with family, friends and solo.
4 family generations have holidayed here for over 50 years. We love it!
On my annual solo trip, I always feel safe with friendly help on hand if needed.
Scenic photos taken with a coffee in hand.

Now in April,  I'm home from a 5 night fun family Easter there! Immaculate amenities, seaside markets, topped off with a night of live music, eats & drinks vans.
Planning our next trip soon!

We loved this caravan park, very neat and tidy, lush green areas well kept, the camp kitchen was outstanding, lots of cooking appliances available to use, everything very clean and stainless steel everywhere.

Beautiful accomodation. Very clean, very modern. Very clean park. Kids loved the playground, the dolphins and pelicans.
Thank you for such a great stay.

We think Google needs to ad more stars as this people here really deserve it more then 5 stars. The customer service was outstanding from Anita and Ash that we had filling they are part of our family too. The campground is very well maintained and clean. Toilets and showers are clean and they function well. Anita & Ash also organised live music band and gin/vodka testing to keep us entertained a bit. We were there on Easter break and had a fantastic time. definitely we will be back. Thank you so much till next time.

We think Google needs to ad more stars as this people here really deserve it more then 5 stars. The customer service was outstanding from Anita and Ash that we had filling they are part of our family too. The campground is very well maintained and clean. Toilets and showers are clean and they function well. Anita & Ash also organised live music band and gin/vodka testing to keep us entertained a bit. We were there on Easter break and had a fantastic time. definitely we will be back. Thank you so much till next time.

We have been satisfied guests staying at Stansbury foreshore caravan park now for many years. Facilities are brilliant & superbly maintained . The people running the park are wonderfully helpful & always ready to assist in any way . They are the reasons we frequent this superb part of Australia every 2 months or so . Also we have made many good friends at the park over the years . We will keep returning until we are unable to . John & Lorraine Rawson . Cheers to all at Stansbury caravan park 👍🍾
Great clean place Kitchen area is amazing
Very clean & tidy park. Great location
We stayed in our caravan right on the beach - such a lovely spot. It was quiet and relaxing. The facilities were spotless and the whole camp was clean. Great place to base yourself.
Fantastic stay, my family have been coming here for 27 years and this trip we shared it with friends from WA, they loved it
My wife and I stayed in one of the cabins. Definitely can't get more water side!! Absolutely amazing views, and a great cabin! Staff were very friendly and helpful. Thoroughly enjoyed our stay!!

Loved our stay and will come back again.

Friendly staff and beautiful views. Great spot to see sunrise over ocean.

We stayed on a powered beachfront site for 2 nights with our dog.
Front beach is good for swimming and has a pontoon as well, side beach is seaweedy, but at low tide is good for crabbing.
Easy access to beach from beachfront sites.
Pelicans are tame and if you're fishing will come and stand with you waiting for a feed.
Dalrymple pub up the road is good, and nice gin to purchase next door.
Cute resident seals hang out at jetty all the time.

For more follow me on Instagram @ginandcamping

Awesome park on the waterfront. Great amenities. Cleanest laundry ever.
Awesome camp kitchen/games room.

Stansbury Caravan Park is so clean and green. The facilities are great.
The service is exceptional.
I love coming here and I try to get here every month if I can. Sometimes I come here on my own and they really look after me. I really appreciate it. This time my car broke down, which means a tow truck is going to tow it back home for me and I couldn’t use it the whole time I was here. They offered to take me to the shops and anywhere I needed to go. It’s an It’s an bummer they didn’t come to bingo with me. 😜
Anita and Ash you are fantastic managers. Thank you. Xx
Caravan site, well maintained, amenities very clean and tidy.  Staff efficient and friendly

Absolutely love Stansbury caravan park.
The maintenance and upkeep. By the current caretakers is perfection.
Highly recommended

Fantastic people, fantastic park.
Very clean. Couldn’t fault the place.
Only wish we’d driven straight past Ardrossan to Stansbury.
Very clean and tidy, extremely comfortable bed, beautiful view, pub in walking distance great caravan park

The caravan park was fantastic- so helpful. Will definitely come back. 10/10 We all came over for the Salt Water Classic- n ver been before - it was so well run with lots to see and do. Well done to the organisers and all who bought their boats, caravans , cars and motorbikes over.
Went to the hotel for dinner- over two days we spent about $1500 between the 12 of our group. Very disappointed when we asked for some serviettes to share some birthday cake- to be told it would be $1 per person- so we left and never went back. Very shortsighted by who ever runs the hotel.
We loved exploring the region and fishing and crabbing.

Great beach front caravan park with really friendly and helpful staff.
We will definitely be coming back
Excellent caravan park, great ammenities, very clean and tidy caravan park. Helpful staff, higher recommend, we will definitely stay there again.
The park and management were fantastic would highly recommend a stay
Stayed in a powered site. Beautiful well kept park. Lovely staff. Highly recommended.
Really good cabins - all cabin equipment worked, cabin was clean, shower was good and bed was comfortable.
Beautiful, relaxing, kid friendly,  although we didn't catch any fish, we still enjoyed fishing, kids especially enjoyed, we will definitely be back next year 😀 😍👨‍👩‍👧‍👦

Great caravan park. Very clean amenities and well cared for, friendly staff.
Again we will return, (about 15 years annually now)

My favourite caravan park and my favourite holiday spot. We have been staying in the park for 60 years with friends and families and  now grandchildren. Whole caravan park is immaculate, including cabins. Uptodate washig machines, great camp kitchen.Highly recommended.

My three day stay was easily and politely attended to by Anita and Gail. Very helpful and nice bunch of people. Caravan site was on foreshore, quiet and very close to amenities. I really like the town if Stansbury.

Another wonderful time holidaying in Stansbury Caravan Park at Easter. Great Sunday afternoon spent with music in the park too. Anita, Ash & the team do a fantastic job keeping the grounds and amenities looking good!
Great park!!! Easy access in and out. Absolute beach frontage. Staff very helpful and happy. Great place for the dog…. Dusty enjoyed it. Will definitely be back…!
Great stay great people. THANKS
What a perfect spot. A little piece of heaven. Thankyou for your hospitality. We will definitely co.e and stay again in the future.

We have been going to Stansbury Caravan Patk for Easter for a few years with family and it is the best.  Lots to do great facilities and the staff are lovely and helpful.  This year was one of the best with food truck, music and gin tasting here’s to many more events it was a highlight.
Great park,had a great time,will definately be back , very friendly management
Management were very helpful and friendly, nothing too much bother. Very relaxed and peaceful stay.
We stayed in a waterfront site and it was wonderful waking up to the ocean each morning!
Awesome stay once again, the park staff were great and the live music and food and drink vans were a hit for us.
Another great weekend at Stansbury. Foreshore park staff were friendly and great to deal with. Manage to get some fish off the beach as well.

We planned a last minute Easter weekend getaway and were lucky enough to find availability at Stansbury Foreshore Caravan Park. When we arrived to check in we were offered an upgrade to stay in a powered camping site compared to the unpowered as we had booked. We couldn’t have been happier! All staff, amenities and views were just amazing. We honestly couldn’t have asked for a better stay. We will definitely be returning as soon as we can! Thanks to all the staff and keep up the amazing work, very very impressed!

This is our fourth visit to the foreshore caravan park and the rest of the family stay at Oyster Bay park.  We love it.  There were 23 of us this year.  Amenities lovely and clean staff friendly thank you for a lovely stay

We stayed in the dog friendly cabin at Oyster Point. The cabin had everything we needed for a comfortable 3 night stay for 4 of us and our pup. Would be fantastic if this was within a shorter walking distance of the town but that is really only minor. Would definitely stay here again.

We had a great experience despite of the issues with the showers. The place is very good equipped and makes everything easy especially for cooking. During our visit they keep you updated with any information about the place and activities which was helpful to plan our trip. Toiles were very well maintained and clean enough.
You people were great thank you for your  hospitality see you next year 😎😎👍🏿👍🏿
We had a great stay at the Stansbury Caravan Park, from the friendly greeting, great and very clean facilities it was a very pleasant lace to unwind for Easter.
Amazing place to stay with top notch amenities and service. The people are very friendly and happy to help with any needs. Great family friendly park
A beautiful, well maintained park, the location to the town and the location of our site were perfect. Thank you

Thanks for a great stay.  The park is looking immaculate.  Facilities are always clean.  The kitchen is well equipped.
You know we’ll be back soon.  Thanks Ash and Anita.

Everything in the Delux Villa has been extremely thought out. The layout, the comfort, the amenities, the colour scheme, and the view!
We couldn't wish for anything else, except that we would liked to have stayed LONGER!.
Highly recommended.
Cannot do enough to help you, absolutely brilliant place to stay
Unable to rate rooms as we stayed in our own van this time, and we did not use the camp kitchen, we have previous stayed in the villa cabin and it was more than adequate.
Beautiful clean, neat park and facilities and very friendly and accommodating staff. Great camp kitchen. So close to shops in the town.
Lovely park with fabulous amenities. Clean and tidy. Staff were friendly and helpful, we even enjoyed an upgraded site with no extra cost!! Had a wonderful stay and would highly recommend to anyone.

We had a great couple of days despite the windy weather. A great location, spotless bathrooms and camp kitchen, good tv & phone reception. Easy walk to the pub, cafe, butcher & supermarket. Great coastal walks & great for watching birdlife.
Loved staying at Stansbury CP , extremely clean and  tidy, fantastic location right on water
Great park clean amenities and close location to town

We had a 2 night stay on a powered waterfront site.  The staff couldn’t be more helpful and the park was beautifully maintained.  Massive amenities block and fabulous camp kitchen facilities.  Easy walk to local facilities.  Highly recommended.
We thoroughly enjoyed our stay. The camp kitchen, amenities, the whole park so clean and the friendliness of the staff was fantastic. Thank you 😊
Fantastic location, clean facilities, and helpful staff.
My only disappointment is that two nights is not enough! Everything was beautiful ☺️
Great place to stay easy access to everywhere
Sites are just picturesque. Great concrete slabs, fantastic & clean amenities. Thanks Stansbury CP!
Had a wonderful weekend with friends on a foreshore site. Large clean amenities and a fantastic camp kitchen. Highly recommend

It was our first time in Stansbury and absolutely loved it
We can’t wait to come back and spend a couple of weeks there

What a wonderful place !
The amenities are excellent, very clean and reasonably modern. The shared kitchen BBQ area is clean, tidy and functional. The dining area is clean and well maintained, a well serviced snack and drink machine is also available and a television to watch if you wish. The park staff are very friendly and thoroughly helpful (the ones I met).
We stayed on a waterfront van site which was level and well maintained, as you can see by the picture it was literally at the water ! There was also a couple of resident local seals who were also totally chilled near the jetty.
Will be back without a doubt !
Would recommend without a doubt whether you are camping or in a van.
This was my first trip to Stansbury but definitely not my last! Wonderful caravan park right on the water. Can’t say enough wonderful things about the reception staff - so lovely and helpful.
We love coming to your  parks yous are always very friendly and the  service is amazing and everything is always so clean
Great time and stay in Stansbury , the office was very welcoming

Stayed at both the Foreshore and Oyster Point parks for nearly three months. Both are beautiful parks, Oyster Point is very quiet. Grounds are well maintained and facilities are kept spotless. Super friendly and helpful staff. Can’t wait to go back!
i had a lovely time at the park will be back just not sure when thankyou
Friendly staff clean caravan park good site access
Been coming here for years now great place ,great clean park , the cleaners do a great job of the toilets and showers and kitchen as well, great job keep it up.

We love, L❤️VE Stansbury Caravan Park.  Our stay was for a month and we simply fell in love with this little seaside town.  The staff here are all amazing.. everyone is super friendly.  We have made new special friends and will continue to meet up as much as possible.

Great Park, Amenities are spotless, staff extremely helpful & pleasant to deal with.
Love staying at Stansbury Foreshore Park

Stansbury is a great little place to visit and the Stansbury Caravan Park is a fantastic little park with great amenities is just a short five minute walk along the foreshore to the town’s little shopping hub.  There is so much to see around the southern Yorke Peninsula and Stansbury is the perfect location to base yourself while exploring.
Staff amazing. Amenities lovely and clean. Camp kitchen great facilities and great choice of gas or electric bbq
Absolutely amazing host beautifully clean a stunning spot right on the beach we’ll be back 😊
Stansbury caravan park was lovely and they helped our group in a bind at very short notice. The camp kitchen was great and the facilities was clean and new.
One of the nicest caravan parks we have stayed in on our travels….. Highly recommend

A great park! Amenities are so well looked after particularly on a long weekend.
Highly recommend this park

Every thing was good bathrooms where clean and tidy
Wind was annoying

Excellent service. 👍
Clean and well maintained facilities.
Great social media updates and notifications on events in the community.
We would definitely recommend this caravan park.  🚐

Another great trip to Stansbury Caravan Park.  Absolutely stunning weather and glorious uninterrupted views of the sea from our cabin balcony.  Relaxed at the local facilities, including the market, pub and café.  Enjoyed riding the e-bikes around the town too.
The cabin was immaculate, perfectly resourced and we look forward to our visits.  The park facilities are always clean. We’ve booked our next visit already.  Thanks crew.

We love coming to Stansbury Caravan Park. Anita is always so friendly, as is the rest of the team.
We have been staying in the spacious luxury 3 bedroom villa for years now and we love it!

The view is amazing and the grass out the front, easy access to water and playground make it great.

However, the villa itself is in outstanding condition and so well equipped. We love the following: heaps of utensils, clean and great range of saucepans/frying pans, beautiful wine glasses and tumblers, storage cupboards, blankets, fans and charger/access points, excellent wifi, Weber on the balcony, 2 large bathrooms- huge shower, ensuite, and the smart TV is also super.

Our two young boys get friendly service when asking for the raking equipment and the team always oblige. They are so friendly.

We love it here! Thanks again Stansbury for a great stay.
None powered site in caravan very relaxing

We hired the dog friendly cabin at Oyster Point and could not fault it. Clean with good facilities and an ideal location. Staff were friendly and helpful and we hope to return.  The Town has all you need including a great pub, pharmacy and cafe.
Great little park to stay, we were at the back park. The lawned area is the best and the amenities were extremely clean. Would definitely recommend!
Beautiful and clean as always.  Great friendly staff
Great cabin. Great environment. Great technology. Free wifi. Free Foxtel. Free Netflix. Quiet. Clean. Five stars all round
Fantastic Location, super friendly staff, and a real effort to go the extra mile with putting on entertainment and BBQ. Excellent stay!

We have stayed here a number of times over the years and have always enjoyed it.
Last 2 times in our caravan on a seafront site which is beautiful (when not too windy) and easy access to the water (makes it very easy to get your kayak in the water).
Always clean with great amenities.
Will definitely be back.
Thnx to all.
We stayed in cabin number 4. Cute little cabin, perfect for 2 people. Super comfortable bed and everything you could need. The park has great facilities and staff are friendly and helpful.
Great park , friendly helpful staff, love camping here , excellent boat fishing ,see you guys next time , Cheers Gus&Deb

The Stansbury Foreshore Caravan Park is absolutely beautiful.  The site we had looked out over the water, the grounds were green and tidy and the amenities were kept immaculately clean.  The best kept park in 51 years of camping!!  Well done!

Our stay at the waterfront luxury villa started badly when we realised that the villa hadn’t been cleaned. However, the mark of great customer service is how good is the response and the response we got was exemplary. The manager was very quick to respond and not only cleaned the villa immediately but refunded us one night’s accommodation, which was amazing.
To top it off, the villa is very comfortable and well equipped and has fantastic views so I would thoroughly recommend a stay at Stansbury Caravan Park.
A lovely caravan park in a great location with awesome camp kitchen, clean amenities, good laundry and friendly management.

Great site fabulous staff
Always enjoy our time at Stansbury

We got an ocean front caravan site without being a beach front site! We loved it, privacy screens separating these bays, board walk along the back of the site, it was a wet, windy stay so we didnt get in the water but loved the outlook and grass sites, amenities are dated but well cared for, spotlessly clean and work perfectly.  Staff lovely and off peak specials really good. Loved our stay and can only imagine what a beautiful place to stay in sunny, warm weather.
Love this park grassed sites as well as concrete slabs,lots of spots with ocean frontage cabins also ocean frontage,but you have to book way in advance,highly recommend this caravan park

This is the second time we have stayed at the Stansbury Caravan Park. The toilet and shower block is always immaculate, the camp kitchen is roomy and has a stove, fridge, microwave and air fryer. There is also a couch and television etc. There is plenty of beach access and beautiful walks with pathways suitable for wheel chairs along the beach front in the town. Stansbury is also very close to other towns on the peninsula. We are all booked in again for next year.  We would recommend it to everyone.
Very nice clean amenities and very friendly and helpful people

This caravan park has excellent facilities and everything we needed for a comfortable stay. The surroundings are absolutely beautiful, with great views and a peaceful atmosphere. The staff were friendly, professional, and always happy to help, which really made our stay even more enjoyable. Highly recommended!
Staff were fantastic, site was awesome plenty of room and bathrooms were very clean. Stay was awesome and we will be back 😄

I have been coming to the Stansbury Caravan Park frequently over the past 7 years, and have found the staff friendly and helpful at all times. The amenities block is always clean and well looked after. It is a beachfront park, so the beautiful beach is right by your door step. Their nightly rates are very reasonable, with a choice of well equipped cabins available  also . The local jetty is close by, and is a great spot for crabbing, squid , and a range of fish , or just enjoy a stroll along the beach . A favourite spot of mine, and will be for many years to come.

We have been coming here for thirty odd years but I must say Anita Park Manager in front office is just a breath of fresh air ... even when she has a bad day
Anita is so welcoming and puts aside her own issues to take care of you, she is friendly, welcoming and always pleasant to deal with. Nothing is too much hassle for this lady and same with Ash her husband they both will try to accommodate your needs as best they can. Stansbury CP has had both good and bad managers in the past some of which we still are friends with and will be long term friends now, but that shows how committed these people have been in the past ... in general its a great friendly park to visit, please consider and Anita/Ash will make you feel very welcome.

Absolutely brilliant caravan park! Spotless amenities & very well looked after! We'll most definitely be back! Had an awesome time!😃
This has been our 3rd stay & it certainly won’t be the last!
Have just had another stay for 5 nights & still amazing! Still my favourite caravan park!
Just had another couple of nights & will always come back! Didn’t want to leave😍
Unpowered site on nice grass area. Facility great. I recommend this friendly park
We loved Stansbury CP it's neat, tidy and well maintained. The facilities are lovely and clean.
Very friendly staff and very friendly campers who are willing to help
Have been staying at the park for many years, always feel like coming home.

Stayed in the foreshore cabins at Stansbury Caravan Park and had a most enjoyable experience close to nature right on the beach front.
The staff were so kind and at short notice the day i arrived, provided me with a cabin.
Good amenities, quiet, relaxing and friendly 👍🏻
Helpful and friendly staff, clean amenities and just a great place to stay

We had a wonderful stay in our van on a beach front site.  Beautiful friendly staff, very clean amenities and the view is magical.
Will definitely book again soon and highly recommend
Great family camp, our kids had a ball
Excellent little caravan park. 4 nights away wife and myself really enjoyed our stay. Can't wait to come back again. We had a powered caravan site

Beachside spot with our RV was perfect!!
Definitely be back! Staff were awesome, location is perfect, amenities were top notch and spotless. Thankyou, see you soon.
Love Stansbury. Thanks Anita and team
We stayed 2 nights, amenities were great, very clean, the kitchen & common room very accommodating. The staff very friendly & efficient. We will recommend & come again
Best caravan park on YP, been coming back for years, our go to place in SA

We had a wonderful stay, caravan powered site 94 was perfect for us. Reasonably sheltered from Southerly winds and had afternoon shade. Facilities were immaculately clean with plenty of cubicles. Beachside views  and quaint small townships with ample facilities.
Had a great relaxing time. Clean park. Clean toilets. Great staff
Fantastic little place to stay
Excellent park. Super clean toilets, lovely views, friendly helpful staff
This is a lovely park right on the foreshore. Friendly staff and very clean amenities. We will be booking again
Great well run park our van site was great .The staff are terrific so helpful, camp kitchen great amenities block always clean showers hot .highly recommended a stay at Stansbury caravan park.

Had sites 24 and 25 for 2 nights..
Great spots and staff..
Stansbury relatively central to lots ..so plenty to do .
Pity about the Algea but not the parks fault..
Would definitely stay again

I'd reckon 4.9/5 just to let them try to think up an improvement. Amenities were great, and an awesome easy stay right from the first phonecall. Thanks. Lovely spot. We hope to be back. The Lows, from Qld
love water front sites, neat and tidy park, love stansbury, glad park pet friendly. will be back real soon

Such a lovely little park, so well kept wth plenty of amenities which are very clean .Beautifully kept lawned bays. Very picturesque, looking out over bay . There and several cabins for hire Town centre is walking distance with a small supermarket , butcher/deli , cafe and pub. Service station for fuel. Staff at caravan park are super friendly and helpful.. Thanks for a relaxing stay, just what we were after.
I loved the music in the bathroom 😍

Great caravan park, right on beach.
Very clean and tidy amenities.
Great camp kitchen

Many trips to Stansbury but first time at the caravan park. Had a lovely stay, friendly staff and met some lovely travellers there also. Amenities were really good, as was the camp kitchen which had some board games for the couple of colder windy days. Would definitely recommend this park to anyone travelling through.

One important point to note is to be careful when making your booking. Make sure to confirm whether you will be allocated to the main site or to Oyster Point Caravan Park. We only found out that we were placed at Oyster Point, which appears to be an older section, upon arrival.

When driving to the alternative park, we had issues accessing the boom gate and there was no staff on site. The reception office is located at the main park. It took us several minutes to sort this out on our own. Also, the map provided at reception was incomplete, and we were only able to find our site with the help of other people staying at the park.

As there were no powered sites available, we booked an unpowered site. However, despite several well grassed sites being vacant throughout our stay, we were allocated a dirt site in an area without grass.

Oyster Point has an average kitchen and a small playground, with very limited options for children. The amenities are spacious and clean, but there is only one amenities block for a very large area, which meant quite a long walk.

Unfortunately, our experience at Oyster Point/Stansbury Caravan Park was not the best.
Excellent Location looking out over the Vincent Gulf. Very friendly staff - managers. Very clean amenities, great kitchen and sitting area with TV.
Excellent park, fantastic staff & park managers.
Always the most friendly welcome staff , well presented park & amenities with beautiful views . We love our 2nd home .
Great spot.  Been coming for 40 years
Perfect little caravan park - great location, clean facilities and beautiful sites.
Facilities are always clean, staff are always polite, grounds are well kept.
We stayed on Site 18 and as always it was beautiful. It was lovely to see 18 Pelicans this trip. They spent a lot of time out the front which was beautiful to see.
The staff at Stansbury Caravan Park are always smiling and willing to help at any time. They take pride in the appearance of their park and always try to ensure holiday makers feel content

Excellent place to stay, fantastic location, right on the beach, friendly staff. Very clean.
I am a regular.

Stayed at Oyster point caravan park with our two dogs. Couldn’t be happier with the stay. Clean grounds, clean amenities, super quiet despite it being peak season. The staff are absolutely beautiful, so helpful and kind! Thanks for a great stay.

Absolutely LOVE Stansbury foreshore Caravan Park..
We called at short notice for a powered campsite (swag) for 2 nights and Cheryl was so helpful.
We were not able to get there before reception closed, but a quick call & they text the details  and made sure we received them so we could enter.
The park is a smaller one, with sites that vary in size, but none of them overly large.
If you would like a larger space when travelling with friends, we recommend booking a few sites together.. each site space is enough for a caravan, and there were  a lot of families of 4 around us without any issues (we were just 2 adults + our dog).
The park backs on to the beach and has free electric  BBQ at the grassed area just outside the park.
Amenities are spacious and clean.
If you would like to take a dog, whilst it is at the Parks discretion, they are accommodating.  Dogs  do need to be on a leash (understandably), but there were plenty of dogs for our dog to make friends with.
We had such a great time at the park and exploring the area & surrounding beaches.

We highly recommend and cannot wait for another visit.
Great staff, great experience!

Great caravan park with super clean amenities. Camp kitchen is well equipped with all cooking gear large 900 cooker air fryer large frypan etc.
Well manicured grounds herbs are abundant .
Anita and Ash were so pleasant
We loved staying here, our cabin was beautiful and the amenities were spotless. Shame it was a bit too windy for fishing 🎣

We have been coming to Stansbury since our kids were young and staying in a villa in the caravan park for many years. Now our  grandchildren love  a holiday in the ‘cubby house’  surrounded by seagulls and pelicans. It’s a great way to start the New Year.
Always a great time away here. We have been coming for 6 years and we love it! Thankyou for another great stay
We had the best powered beachfront site in our motorhome, our view and sea breezes were great
Beautiful caravan park with good service from the park management. Site was clean and well looked after. Easy to navigate park with clean amenities. Having easy access to beach was a plus.

Staff and service was great, excellent location, nice park. Marked down because our site was a very tight fit, despite entering our vehicle length when booking through G'day app. Also not sure that all the beachfront sites should be allowed to park on the road - this makes getting onto sites hard, and can be dangerous with kids on bikes and pedestrians sharing what's left of the road.
Really nice friendly place to stay, amenities were super clean!

Stansbury Foreshore Caravan Park is an absolute gem! The park is beautiful, not too big or too small. Has everything you need for a perfect getaway not to mention, the staff are super friendly and accommodating. Will definitely be back for a bigger stay next time!!!

We set our camper trailer up there and had a great site and the staff, Anita was superb! Parked our boat and ute at the secondary site! Anita was so helpful and realistic about a request! Simply loved our stay here!👍👍👍👌❤️
Nice quiet park with great facilities. Staff are always there to help. Great way to spend a week over New Years.
Come here every year. Small friendly site, great camp kitchen and bathrooms kept nice and clean. Great location for the beach.

To say that I was completely disappointed with this place would be a huge understatement, I booked an unpowered site at oyster point which looked nothing like the photos online. I have never seen so many people in one small space.
My partner and I arrived on nye which was a mistake on our end as we had to find somewhere else to go.
We did not stay here at all as it was falsely advertised online. I would recommend staying here.
Great park
Great park, great value

The friendliest service ever and the most magnificent positioning on powered site no 1 with green grass and leveled pads Exceptionally clean amenities. We will definitely return. Thank you for the lovely memories, guys 😊

We had a powered caravan site. Really happy with the service on arrival, friendly & cheerful staff members. Great park overall… loved how there were grass/lawn on so many of the powered site, including ours. The shower/toilet block was very clean & plenty of room. Nice camp kitchen too.
We would rate this caravan park 10 out of 10 👌

It was another wonderful stay at Stansbury Very friendly and helpful staff. I also got to meet the cheeky William the Willy wagtail at the front desk as we checked out. Can never get enough of Stansbury !
We have been coming here for over 30 years, and absolutely love it!

Have been staying here now for a decade, at least once per year. Wouldn't stay anywhere else - the facilities are always maintained well, staff always friendly and it s a short drive to so many amazing places.

Clean, Tidy
Everything supplied
Excellent grounds
Very friendly, helpful staff (Anita)
Amenities blocks- excellent

Luxury cabin was just magnificent, very clean and comfortable. Had everything we needed for our 2 night stay. As there was a large group of us the camp kitchen was brilliant.
Was very windy but you just have to accept that when you are so close to the water and facing south East but the view was worth putting up with the wind.

We have been coming to Stansbury Caravan Park for over 20 years in a row and the stay has always been a wonderful part of our year. The staff have always been welcoming and friendly with the location a hidden gem.

We love Stansbury & stay in the Park every year. The villa's on the beach front have everything we need. The staff are friendly & welcoming. We enjoy sitting out on the deck watching the bird life & the view of the ocean, fishing & carefree walks along the beach.
Excellent park. Staff were super friendly and could not have been more helpful.
Fantastic park with great staff Highly recommend staying here
Amenities are excellent, clean and well maintained. Staff are friendly and informative and above all, a great location with the beach at your doorstep. Wish I could have stayed longer!

We are visiting from Hawaii, and this campervan park has been absolutely wonderful. The park is clean, peaceful, and very well maintained, but what really stood out was the staff — they were incredibly kind and helpful. They even lent us crab-catching gear, which made our stay extra special and memorable.

We truly felt welcomed here and had a fantastic experience. Highly recommended!

Best caravan park in SA.
Facilities immaculate & friendly, helpful service.

Stansbury Caravan Park is a fantastic park. Fantastic and friendly managers and staff. One of the best and most unique caravan parks we have ever been to in our travels around Australia. Anita and Ash are absolutely brilliant.  We are there twice a year and love it.

We recently stayed 4 nights in a deluxe cabin. Although it was an older cabin it had a fantastic view over the sea, and was spotlessly clean. The cabin was very well equipped with everything we needed, and the bed was super comfortable. The reception staff were very friendly and helpful when we had to change our booking for health reasons. We look forward to visiting again soon!
First time and had a nice stay. Very affordable, clean and tidy facilities. Would definitely recommend. Thanks

Clean and tidy, moved bookings around to accomodate us and friends so we were together! 👍
Facilities clean and tidy. Now on our “stay again” list!
Great spot to stay.
I love it and ill be back
We had an excellent experience and stay. Managers were very welcoming and obliging.
Great caravan park with clean and tidy bathrooms will definitely be coming back especially with the views from the van
Clean, comfortable villa. Lovely view over the water. Friendly, helpful staff

Our stay in our camper van was awsome, the staff are lovely and very professional. All facilities were amazing, very clean and tidy. Such a wonderfull location in the Yorke Peninsula. Many thanks for a relaxed and happy holiday in your park. Warm regards Brenton & Jason.
Highly recommend great place friendly staff  room was clean and was  a great stay.
Great location,  very clean, friendly and helpful staff, quiet and picturesque on the point of the bay

Booked for two nights and stayed for three. Loved this CP for the grassy sites, lovely staff and water views. The local pub is excellent and the town lawns and roses are magnificently maintained.  Great base for exploring the Eastern coast of Yorke Peninsula.
Great base to explore southern parts of the Yorke Peninsula- friendly staff and clean amenities
Showers and toilets lovely and clean reception was very friendly grounds were very clean and the town and pub was great
Absolutely  beautiful  ...just perfect to  unwind
The staff are very helpful . Top place to stay
Was put on site 61 and has great views and close to ammenities.Caravan site

An excellent place to stay!  We had two cabins right beside the sea - could not have been better 💖!  Well equipped cabins and beautiful hot showers.
Lovely to see sunrise over the water, and so much birdlife at the turn of the tide.  We had a wonderful stay.  And close to everything else in town.  Everything is in easy walking distance -  including the exceptional Dalrymple restaurant.
The staff at the park were exceptionally helpful and friendly - indeed all of the lovely town of Stansbury is like that.   Definitely on our list for a return visit.

We had a great stay and even better location while at the Park. 👍
But what was even more special staff went above and beyond when we called to ask if they would mind checking to see if we had left our new set of muk mats behind.
With no hesitation and a short time later we received a call to let us know our mat was found and safely stored.
Cheers for the Staff at Stansbury CP.
Caravan Park in nice setting on beach front. All facilities look well maintained. Cabin was beach front, was neat & clean.  Certainly a very nice place to stay & relax.
Fantastic cabin, location right on the water, private, nice park well maintained. Friendly and obliging staff. Would definitely recommend this park to my friends.
Staff was very friendly and helpful. Everything was very clean and well kept. Love the place.

Spent a couple of nights in one of the two bedroom waterfront cabins, using a ‘Coast is Calling’ voucher. The cabin was really clean, very comfortable, and private with sensational views out to the sea to capture beautiful sunrises and the abundant water birds.
The main street is an easy walk to the local pub for excellent meals, a cafe and a supermarket.
Anita’s communication through the booking process was great, as was her overall customer service. It’s clear that she and Ash really care about the conditions and amenities.
We’d very happily stay again…if we can get in as all the outstanding reviews may make it difficult. 😄

What an awesome location…..the hosts Anita & Ash were amazing…..the way they interacted with guests & were incredibly accomodating upgrading our site with Ash moving the van with the park tractor……these guys rock 👏

Overnight stay while exploring the Yorke Peninsula.

Excellent accommodation, everything I needed, bed comfortable, very clean, great location.

We stayed on a powered waterfront site, amazing views, sunrise just as spectacular. Camp kitchen is very clean and well equipped with everything you need. Ourdoor BBQ available also kept clean. Amenities very well maintained.  Park is small in comparison to other G'day parks, very quiet and relaxing if your wanting some quiet downtime. Local IGA, INFO center, pub all in walking distance. Also pet friendly   Thanks for allowing us to stay with you.
Very clean!! Staffs are very friendly as well!!!

This is our only goto place to stay on the peninsula.
The staff are fantastic and the amenities are always kept fastidiously clean.
If you haven't booked a stay ..  what are you waiting for !!!
Workers there at the part amazing great help

Absolutely fantastic caravan park! The managers are friendly, helpful, and really make you feel welcome. The whole park is spotless — clean, tidy, and really well looked after. The views are stunning, and it’s such a relaxing place to stay. Highly recommend for anyone looking for a great caravan park experience!

Wonderful location and caravan park neat and tidy situated right at waters edge. Amenities well maintained.
Lovely little township and well situated to explore the lower Yorke Peninsula.

An annual stay for us for about the last 10 or so years.
Always friendly, welcoming & nothing is too much trouble.
This attitude filters down through all staffing roles.
We love it. Thank you🤗

The room had everything we needed. It was clean and tidy. The view from our front window was amazing. We could watch the tide come in and out as well as the local bird life. It was so relaxing. We could also walk along the beach down to the jetty and the local IGA and coffee shops were only minutes away.
Great place to stay.  Nice town to have a look around.

Waterfront cabin blessed with dolphins at breakfast, pelicans all day, migratory birds, beautiful coastline, relaxing and friendly x
We will be back

We had a great stay.
Service was great.
Thanks for everything you did for us.
Grateful for the use of the camp kitchen and for returning my jacket.
You went above and beyond for us.

Always love staying here in our caravan. Sites are well maintained, all the staff are friendly and helpful.
Amenities kept very clean and the radio while having a shower is great.
Wonderful location, but like any right on the sea, be prepared for strong wind at certain times.
Would highly recommend.

We had two nights here - two couples sharing one of their newer Foreshore Luxury 3 bedroom Villas at $270/night, so reasonably economical. The wind was howling and we had a bit of rain but were very comfortable as the villa had excellent comfortable facilities a very good kitchen set up, plus 2 bathrooms. Lovely ocean facing deck with great views, and despite the close proximity of other guests in caravans etc it was pretty quiet. The reception lady (Anita from memory) was very helpful right from the start of the booking process. The Stansbury area was great too as we love our morning walks and there's plenty of options hereabouts. Good pub, cafe, butcher and supermarket in town
Fantastic park very clean and tidy
We had a great 2 night stay. Nice to have ocean at our doorstep. Office staff are so helpful, right from the booking stage. We will return.
Fantastic place to spend some time. Its ultra clean with a nice camp kitchen. The grounds are well maintained and the staff are the friendliest you will ever find. Cant help but keep coming back
The staff are very friendly and very helpful. We bring our 2 cats with us and there is no problems. Always have a fantastic time and would recommend anyone to stay there.
Very nice and clean perfect place to stay will be back  thankyou
Staff are friendly and accommodating. The park is going through some changes for the good.  Amenities are always clean.  Support these guys doing it tough thru the bloom.

Fabulous luxury 3br cabin on the shore front. Spotlessly clean, had everything you would need and more. Amenities were excellent. Very helpful and friendly staff absolutely there to help in any way. We had a great stay and would return again for sure. Well done to Anita and her crew and thank you so much.
We go to the caravan park every year the staff are friendly our villa is always clean and has a great view of the ocean it's so peaceful
Brilliant time - from check-in to departure. Staff were friendly & helpful and cabin was clean, tidy - perfect, a truly great place to stay - will be back. 👍
Very clean and tidy park. We had a great spot on the water. Easy walk to what the town has to offer
Absolutely wonderful customer service, brilliant communication pre arrival and immaculate ammenities and grounds. Views amazing, thank you for a great stay, will be returning 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟

Loved our stay at Stansbury
Very pleasant and helpful staff

Great caravan park with clean amenities. Clean fully equipped camp kitchen. Excellent lawn areas and great location, and not far from boat ramp. Great beach for the kids.
Owners are very efficient in keeping the park pristine.
Not far from pub and supermarket.

Beautiful park, Amazing staff, Booking process easy to navigate, well maintained lawns and gardens, spotless amenities
We had a fantastic 3 nights in Stansbury
Foreshore Caravan Park
Thankyou
The park is spotless well maintained and the staff are a credit to the park and the community

I love this caravan park - lovely lawn sites, friendly service & the most impressive kitchen & dining setup I’ve ever seen in a park! A great little playground also. It was our first year actually staying in our own van & will definitely be back to stay.

We absolutely loved the powered sites. And the service was amazing. Anita and gale are absolute legends. Especially Anita helping me organise sites for our next visits. I will be recommending Stansbury caravan park to people. We will be back.

We had a wonderful stay! The cabin was spotless and very well equipped, with beautiful ocean views and breathtaking sunrises. The managers were friendly, and the service was efficient. The communal facilities were also beautifully maintained. We’ll definitely be coming back soon. Thank you for a fantastic stay!

⸻

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Wonderful Stay at Stansbury Caravan Park

We stayed in a two-bedroom villa right on the water’s edge — it was clean, comfortable, and had everything we needed. The park managers were fantastic — nothing was too much trouble and they were always helpful and friendly. We enjoyed our stay so much that we’ve already booked again for next year and are bringing the whole family, including the grandchildren. Highly recommend this park for a relaxing and enjoyable getaway!

The location is fantastic the park is well looked after and the amenities are perfect . The camp kitchen caters for everyone's needs I have to say the best one we have seen.
The manager went above and beyond for us helping with  4 vans and  catering for us so we could all be together with room to move around we were all so grateful.
We will definitely be back again . A big thankyou to the managers for an enjoyable holiday .

A wonderful relaxing stay for 16 nights!
The park was in the best condition it has been in years! Just immaculate!
The staff are extremely friendly & helpful (shout out to Anita who goes above and beyond!).
Could not recommend this park more highly 🥰
Beautiful place to stay.  Very clean and tidy amenities.  Friendly staff.  Definitely recommend

We've been going to our regular cabins in Stansbury caravan Park for at least 5 years because it's such a beautiful location,the Cabins and grounds are exceptionally kept with all the facilities one would need for a great Holiday,beach it's on the door step and Kids have a great playground to keep them busy.. Thanks Stansbury see you again soon.. 👍 👍 👍

What a hidden gem of a caravan park situated right on the beach front in Stansbury SA. My wife and I have been coming here for a few years and many more to come, love the laid back quiet town and the relaxed boutique style well run Stansbury Caravan Park. Amenities are very clean and modern, the staff are very friendly and helpful, nothing is to much of a bother for them to assist in making your stay a pleasant and enjoyable experience. This is our favourite park in SA and I can't recommend enough for mature travellers and family as well.

On an unpowered site an oyster point Stansbury. The amenities are very clean and showers work well. The camp kitchen was good however our first morning no bbq or hot water would work as the gas hadn’t been checked. But corrected that afternoon. Two of the nights guests were allowed to party in the camp kitchen to 3:30am even after ringing the park at 1am. I would have thought camp kitchens close at 10:30? Getting to the toilet block you have to navigate through all the permanent sites. Grass was good in October. Not really a swimming beach adjacent to the park.

The amazing staff went above and beyond for us with a family situation. We cannot thank them enough. We had a caravan site.So helpful. Sites are lovely clean and green. Amenities very clean. I would give them a higher score if I could. Thankyou had a great stay. Excellent camp kitchen.
Gem of a park, another wonderful stay with pets. Will be back for sure.

One of the best kept caravan parks we have encountered. Amenities were spotlessly clean and grounds were beautifully maintained. Reception staff very friendly and helpful. I would highly recommend staying at Stansbury Caravan Parkon your next visit to the York Peninsula.

Stansbury CP once again we had a wonderful time. No sign of the algal bloom with beautiful clean beaches. Some of the amenities have had a refresh since last time and are looking schmick. Cannot wait until January when we’re booked in again.
Very friendly

We recently spent 4 nights at the Stansbury Caravan Park. We have been on the road for 45 days and stayed at a number of parks. Stansbury was without doubt the best park we have stayed at, both on this trip and other trips included.

Anita was an absolute delight to deal with, she was so helpful and accommodating. The amenities were outstanding in presentation, cleanliness, maintenance and presentation. The sites were clean and very maintained and the entire staff were friendly and welcoming.

I definitely recommend this park to all travellers and we will definitely return in the future. Thank you Anita and all the staff.

Great spot, easy fishing off the shore. Amenities very clean, fabulous kitchen with everything available. Nice even sites.
Staff lovely.
Always a pleasure visiting  Stansbury  Caravan  Park, amenities are spotless and the park is very well looked after with million dollar views!
The location really good , recommended for the family,  the lady  at the reception are so friendly and helpfull . good for fishing location and crabbing .

Fantastic caravan park on the waters edge with very clean and well thought out amenities. Friendly staff to match the friendly / relaxed nature of the township.  From watching the various bird life in the mornings  to throwing a fishing line in at the waters edge to seeing the  local dolphins during the afternoons. Highly recommend for a relaxing trip away. Darren & Janette
We stayed in the off season when the park and the town was very quiet. Great friendly staff who could not do enough for you. Good clean facilities. Beautiful walks along the beachfront.
Caravan site- tidy, green with amazing views

Stansbury caravan park is an ideal spot on Yorke Peninsula for a seaside break.
Beachfront sites. Immaculate ablutions. Friendly helpful staff plus good facilities in the town. Will definitely return.

Thanks to Anita and Ash for another fantastic weekend at the park. Even the horrible weather couldn't ruin the weekend. We look forward to next year!!  I even won the fishing comp 😊 🏆 lots of great memories made.
Nice and clean park. Park owners were very helpful and to let a group book a few sites close/ next to each other.

We had such a great stay we stayed an extra day.
Great location, clean amenities, fantastic camp kitchen, efficient laundry, roomy sites, awesome views and beach access and of course lovely staff.
Would highly recommend staying here.
Lovely people, nice well equipped cabins , lovely views
Love staying at the Stansbury caravan park!
Everything was easy, everything was accessible,  park was clean - couldn't have asked for anything different
The best little caravan park on the Yorke Peninsula. Great views, fantastic facilities and staff. My favourite place to stay.🥰

Lovely seafront park on Yorke Peninsula.
Spacious van sites. Really clean,well designed amenities.
Within walking distance of shops,coffee and nice country pub with a varied menu.
We enjoyed the little extras (a Nesspresso machine, hot chocolate sachet, heavy quality frying pan) they gave our holiday a special feeling.

Fabulous night at Stansbury
Very clean cabin with everything we needed

Great caravan park central for getting around the lower peninsular. The park is very clean and well kept. Staff are very accommodating for your every needs. There are lot of things to do even when the fishing is interrupted

Few globes not working, should have see though glass / plastic on patio so when sitting on lounge you can see the birds /water in winter. very clean. Could have privacy blinds between units 10 11 12 on patio on
Awesome staff awesome and awesome views

We originally booked for 3 nights but loved it so much we extended our stay! The park has such a relaxing atmosphere, everything is spotlessly clean, and Anita in the office was incredibly friendly, welcoming and accommodating. The views are absolutely stunning. The wildlife of Pelicans, Seals, and even baby plovers!! We also over indulged in the wonderful oysters not far from the Park. Totally recommend Stansbury Caravan Park to anyone looking for the perfect getaway.

Wow, a beautiful spot to have a winter break. Powered site in a beautiful spot. Close to the beach, amenities and a walk away from the local pub and cafe. The staff are fantastic, Anita is just lovely and nothing is too much trouble.
Thank you Stansbury Caravan Park. We will see you in October.
A great spot with superb beach front cabin.
Lovely park, extremely clean amenities and very helpful staff! Can't go wrong!
Lovely cabin, great views and very friendly staff, what more can you ask for.
A fabulous park. Flat grassy sites. Sea views. Great town amenities within walking distance. Highly recommend.
Great place to stay friendly staff water front location
Great clean caravan park very friendly staff love this place will be back
Great location right near water, very clean facilities. Well kept park. Very friendly and welcoming staff.

The Park is absolutely great. Very clean neat tidy amenities within beautifully kept grounds. Very helpful and approachable staff with country sense of humours. Happy to recommend this Caravan Park to other travellers. Thankyou
Lovely place to stay, the hosts are magnificent and the park is well kept, the amenities are very clean and tidy and we will definitely recommend them to anyone.

Well what a fantastic stay i had. The nicest people Anita and Ash they made sure i was ok and helped me with my van can't complain about anything. Very clean and the best camp kitchen I've been in. Thanks Anita and Ash your both the best and I'll be back to stay

The place is in an amazing spot and the staff are absolutely fantastic! The amenities like toilet and showers were super clean and the camp kitchen looks almost new and has everything you need!
The grounds are very clean and tidy.
10/10 will be coming back again!

Michelle was great. She put us right near the amenities block for washing and upgraded us from Oyster Drive CP.  I loved all the garden beds growing herbs. What a fantastic idea for campers to be able to use.
Friendly place to stay,  can't find any faults with the caravan park,  extremely clean to, beautiful waterfront views. I'd recommend this park  10/10

I have nothing but good things to say about Stansbury Caravan Park. My partner and I booked our trip months in advance, so unfortunately you take the risk that the weather will not be ideal. Upon walking in to check into our site, the wonderful reception lady offered for us to move to a different site than our original as it was right on the beach front and the wind was pretty crazy, which is not ideal for a rooftop tent. Then further into our trip, unfortunately the wind and rain set in, the amazing staff offered us a cabin as they felt bad that we were out in the cold and wind. I truly cannot be more appreciative of the accomodations the staff at Stansbury Caravan Park made,  they made you feel welcomed and cared for. Overall the camp grounds are beautiful being right on the beach front. The camp kitchen is amazing and bathroom facilitates kept clean and well maintained. I would highly recommend Stansbury Caravan Park to anyone wanting to visit the Yorke Peninsula.

Clean and neat
Very friendly and helpful staff and close to pub
Right on the water
Very well kept caravan park, cabins are great too 👍👍
Oyster Point - Lovely safe park for families. Could do with some lighting around near the cabins. Very dark to navigate at night time. Spotlessly clean amenities as always.

Beautiful clean and tidy caravan park was just a perfect place to relax and rewind. The Weather was perfect for winter walks with our dogs. It was a nice and peaceful location and the staff were welcoming and accomodating Thank you

The location of the cabins and views are second to none. Cute little accommodation that has everything you need (minus pots and pans). Easy walk to jetty, shops, walking trails and playgrounds. Very clean facilities too
Excellent customer service. fantastic people great town, great old memories. Thank you 😄😄

Absolutely wonderful stay, deluxe cabins were beautiful! Very well thought out cabin, lovely linen, comfy beds, kitchen stocked over and above with the essential cooking and cleaning gear. Friendly staff. Highly recommend.  We'll be back!
Clean neat and tidy with friendly service.

The cabin was immaculate, clean everything you needed was there. The whole caravan park was clean and tidy. It was very quiet and we were right on the foreshore so we had a lovely view of the sea. Staff were very friendly and helpful.
We had a lovely few days break. It was a pleasure to stay there. Thank you. 🙂

We arrived in our Caravan without a booking. We were welcomed & were offered multiple choices of powered sites to choose from. We chose a beautiful beachside site overlooking a pontoon where the Pelicans, Seagulls, Cormorants & other species congregated to enjoy their daily activities.
We loved the continuous radio music streaming from Adelaide Gold1323 in the amenities block.
We thoroughly enjoyed our 7 night stay & strongly recommend a stay here.

11 lovely days, amazing winter weather, beautiful walks along the beach or along flat, paved footpaths.
Our little cabin was clean and tidy, well appointed just right for us.
The big new ones are very swanky.
Caravan park facilities are excellent.

We stayed in a powered site, the area was well kept, the caravan was on a cement block with pavers as we stepped out of the van, our site was wonderful with great views. We will definitely visit again!
Had a lovely weekend here recently, the park is lovely, with clean amenities and  room enough for everyone. Staff friendly and helpful, rates are good, too!

Our Caravan stay for our second week has been a great experience and we have had great weather too.
The staff here have been very helpful when we got very sick and offered to help with getting items, or even doing some shopping for us bit we had everything we needed, but it was lovely to have others offer to help.
Our stay was exceptional even though we were sick 😫 thanks to them all.
Lovely place, fantastic people, great facilities. The views and walking trails are excellent. We had a month here, and it's made such a good impression we have decided to stay in the area!

We stayed at five tourist parks on this road trip and Stansbury's was the ONLY one in which everything worked - great maintenance. Ample facilities for food/drink preparations and dish care. The only downside was no hooks in the bathroom, something we are starting to find more often. Nowhere to hang or even place clothes while showering or completing ablutions.
Clean modern facilities
Great clean friendly park, camp kitchen and toilets extremely clean. Loved being right on the waters edge.

This was a stopover on our trip to Western Australia. We had a great waterfront site. It was relaxing and peaceful and we would recommend this to anybody who wished to stay over for a few days like we did.

Wonderful Cabin
Great Location
All year round
Very clean and tidy
Well done👍
We love Stansbury Caravan Park .lovely sites, clean and serviced amenities, hot showers, step out our van and down to fish, came for 2 nights and stayed for 4 ( 1 free night) we will be back soon
Friendly helpful staff, prefect location next to the water
Our favourite home away from home. We always have a fabulous relaxing time at this park, we stay in the dog friendly cabin which is situated right on the beach front. Can’t wait to come back!
Always a great central location for York's. Anita, Ash, Michelle and Leon are so friendly and helpful it makes a.big difference.

Although we chose the worst weather weekend to be away, the grounds were wonderful,  the facilities clean and welcoming..There was a couple of families who chose to not supervise their children in communal areas, making it difficult to have quiet conversations. Overall a wonderful weekend.
Fantastic spot! Excellent, clean and cosy villa. It was a lot more than expected.
Sensational
Friendly staff . Excellent clean amenities . Grounds lovely . Would recommend to anyone .
Good park from the outside.  I just visited a friend.

We stayed on a waterfront powered site. And I do mean waterfront! Beautiful green grass with slab for van and pavement beside. Very reasonably priced in off season. Management was great very friendly and accommodating. Amenities were excellent. An exceptionally well maintained park in a perfect location. The whole town of Stansbury should be very proud of their beautiful town one of the best we’ve seen.
Nice clean park with renovated Amenities. The lovely management team were very helpful. We had Site#13 right on the beach. Brilliant sunrises during our stay😁
This was a great little park. Right on the water. Our site nice and close to amenities and camp kitchen. Recommend to anyone travelling on the Yorke

Stayed for two nights in our caravan. Lovely beachfront powered site. Amenities spotless. Easy walk to local pub and shops. Good walks along foreshore and cliff tops. Easy check in and friendly staff.

Caravan parked on a fantastic foreshore site, thoroughly enjoyed my stay. The caretakers of this park are fabulous and will do their best to ensure a relaxing and stress free holiday. Anita and Michelle and the boys are great. Definitely stay again.
Lovely luxury villa, fantastic outlook, peaceful and serene. Well worth the drive highly recommended.
We've been coming over here for many years and it is still one of the best parks on the peninsular. We keep coming back.
Excellent stay over Easter which deteriorated unfortunately with the arrival of school holiday clientele
Wonderful caravan park with easy checkin,  very friendly staff and amenities A1, would definitely recommend.

Was given a site big enough for our van, boat and vehicle. Boat fishing was very poor but big catches of mullet were caught from the park beach. Weather was great with no wind but the algae bloom still hadn't subsided (I'm a fishing expert) so buzzed over to the other side for a day of catching KGW. A benefit of being a central location.
Showers and amenities were perfect and freshly painted.
(If you can't get channel 7, your TV is probably too old as they changed their frequency or codec.) One big plus is the free strong WiFi connection if you need to check work emails. Has been a couple of years since our last booking and this one was very relaxing and being off peak, not crowded and lay back. Will be back. Thanks guys.
Great park, right next to the beach. Very clean facilities and friendly staff

First time at Stansbury  very impressed
Thank you for having us see ya next time.

Bathroom/toilet cramped.
Glass sliding door noisy and bumpy
More sound insulation required between bedrooms

We loved the deluxe cabin. It had stunning sea view & had everything we needed. Lots of attention to detail & everything worked. Very well designed for storage & practicality. The cabin was spotless & the bed very comfortable. Wish we could’ve stayed longer and hope to come back one day. Highly recommended.!

Always friendly staff, the amenities always clean, we love staying at Stansbury. The park grounds are neat and tidy, and the van sites are large. You couldn’t set up your van any closer to the water front, beach fishing right at your front door.  A beautiful peaceful park, that we enjoy coming back to every year.
Caravan park is nice and quiet, well maintained and friendly staff.
Facilities were very clean. Staff were extremely friendly and we had a corner caravan site with near 270 degree views over the water. Would happily stay here again.
Beautiful park to stay in super friendly staff, very clean amenities, great protected camp kitchen with every appliance you can think of.
Lovely place to stay
A lot of fun but mullet gone Awol
A G'day Park member and this park was excellent.  Unit was clean and on the waters edge. The bird life especially at low tide was incredible.  Would definitely stay again if in the area.

Loved our stay .. easy walk into town.. great walk to the the jetty .. Amenities were beautiful and clean , loved the music while you’re in there ..
very helpful at reception..
would definitely stay again
Thanks for a great stay
Staff amazing and facilities and location ideal

We spent one night on an unpowered site over the Easter weekend. Since we hadn’t booked in advance, the lady at reception did everything she could to find us a spot. She managed to get us one with an ocean view : it was amazing !

The campground has all the necessary facilities, and everything was very clean. Unfortunately, I forgot some clothes in the shower block, but once again, the lady at reception was incredibly kind and did everything she could to help me get them back.

I highly recommend this campground !
Caravan park hosts were great.
Appreciated the clean facilities, well looked after …. thankyou.

A massive thank you to Anita and Michelle for making our stay at the caravan park a beautiful one. Easter holiday was my 3rd visit to the park and every single time you are extremely helpful. Stansbury caravan Park has become our home away from home. You customer service is amazing every single time. A big thank you and we'll see you soon.
Maya

We stayed on powered site with our swag. The service we received was friendly and prompt. The amenities at this site are great and well maintained. Very convenient location in Stansbury. We will definitely visit again!
The cabin was cozy, clean, neat and had everything we needed to sleep comfortably while passing through with complimentary soap, conditioner, shampoo and coffee/tea.
Excellent park and service from the friendly staff.
Always love coming back , 35 yrs no matter what the weather throws at you 🙈
Another great stay here.  We have been coming for 25 years with the whole family. Staff wonderful yet again. See you again next year.

We were at oyster bay very clean bathrooms
Lawn could be better where we were parked and for kids a bit of a play area

We stayed at Stansbury over Easter for 5 nights in an unpowered site. We enjoyed the caravan park , amenities were really clean and there were plenty of toilets/showers so there was never a time you had to wait. Was dog friendly which was great as long as they were in leash (although there was a few that were off lead).playground was small, but big enough for our kids.  Our only critique would be the site on the unpowered section was smaller than anticipated. It did get extremely windy (50km p/h) which was out of the caravan parks control but would recommend coming well equipped with some strong pegs and rope for just in case. All in all we did really enjoy our stay!
Fabulous, great location and friendly staff. Excellent amenities, lots of showers and toilets. They have a dump point and water available to fill tanks. 5 stars!
Stayed on a powered site, clean and lovely park. Staff are amazing and so helpful, weather was amazing too 😊
Have been coming for years with my family! Stayed in one of the upgraded cabins this time round and boy is it worth every penny! Love this place so much.
The cabin had everything we needed. The park was very clean and tidy but the location is unbelievably good!
We had a waterfront caravan site and it was beautiful. Amenities were excellent and very clean. It was a lovely place to stay and I would certainly recommend it.

Great place to stay right on the beachfront!
Friendly people and Stansbury has a really cool relaxed vibe - highly recommend!
We had a wonderfully relaxing break, the cabin was very clean and comfortable. A little home away from home. Thankyou Stansbury Caravan Park.
Stunning location and absolutely amazing service from the office staff and maintenance. Beautiful lawned caravan sites and great sea views. Will be back!
Great central location on the Yorke Peninsula. Easy check-in. Big sites. Amenities are large and spotless.
Stayed on powered site amenities were very clean and didn't look that old all staff were friendly and helpful sites were all either paved or grass well looked after
Had a fabulous 3 night stay in Luxury Villa nr1 - beautifully appointed, well equiped with all you need for a relaxing stay.
Facilities spotless, great park

This is a little gem. The park is top shelf with first class clean ammenities. Easy walking around town. Very professional owners & would certainly return if in this part again. Well done & keep up the great work.
What a fabulous park! We loved the spot, the views, the people were friendly, was well maintained, great amenities! We will definitely be back!
Very friendly and very efficient  staff . Best C/park on the York. Cabin spotless . Thank you
Ideal location and friendly staff.  A definite stopover again.
We stayed here one night they were so friendly and helpful were going to stay another and they were happy to accommodate but we didn't will be back again clean amenities highly recomwnd
Fantastic spot loved the green grass everywhere,  ammenties were spotless , loved our stay
Absolutely beautiful

Stansbury can be a bit windy so we stayed at the second park which is more of a permanent holiday park rather than the first park on the beach. During our overnight stay it was very quiet and we hardly seen another person. The amenities, laundry $3 per load and camp kitchen are very good. Anita and her partner are very courteous, professional and lovely people. I would highly recommend this park for a stay.

Great caravan park! Powered sites are good but a little tight with cars & boats parked on the road but everyone very obliging to move if necessary. Staff offer help if you need someone to back your Van in for you. No trouble at all!
Office staff are amazing from booking in to checking in to leaving. Amenities are awesome & kept super clean.

Great, affordable last minute accommodation.. love the camp kitchen and fish cleaning facilities as well as green grass for the swag.

Unfortunately, some other guests had a loud party til very very late. Vulgare language quoted the next day by my son. This also soured our sparrow fart fishing plans. (Twas a public holiday weekend though)
Great setting Right on the water walking distance from pub
Great location friendly staff close to supermarket,butcher and Hotel.

What a great couple of nights at the Oyster Point Caravan Park.  We had a cabin, all the mod cons, quiet area and easy access to shops, beaches, and a wonderful walking trail.  Anita was happy, bright and cheerful which made the stay even better. We will be back.  A beautiful laid back weekend.

We had an amazing time at Stansbury Caravan Park! Would also come back.
Perfect service, super nice reception lady! In person but also over the phone.
Amenities are good & got cleaned every day!
Markets are on every Sunday

Must visit: Berry Bay!!
For us the Oyster Point Caravan Park was a hidden gem. Unpowered site, but close to the camp kitchen and facilities, and lots of well kept grass. Ten minute walk to the village. Very nice.

Wonderful friendly caravan park with great fishing and crabbing right out front. What makes this park enjoyable are the managers, Leon & Michelle and Ash & Anita, along with their staff, make our month stay every year wonderful. It can be tight but there's a tractor to pop you on site and most people are accommodating by moving their cars. All in all a fantastic caravan park.
Lovely spot and new slabs make it better
First class service and advice. Bathrooms toilet blocks were spotless. Lorikeets in the trees were an added bonus. Will be returning to the oyster road facility hopefully sooner than later 👍👍😀
We had a 2 night stay in a deluxe villa which was delightful. Quiet location, lovely villa and friendly staff/owner
Always enjoy our stay at Stansbury, great park, friendly staff and super amenities. Once the “drippy” trees are gone it will be even better.

Amazing place to stay for a few days of fishing 🎣 crabbing 🦀 squidding 🐙 and relaxing 🍺🍷
Amenities are clean , park is very nice - definitely will be back 👌
We loved staying at Stansbury Caravan Park! Beautifully maintained and clean park with nice grassed sites right on the water! Delightful staff too.
Had lovely stay caravan site was great camp kitchen a hit amenities clean and good so a great thank you all the staff
Love love Stansbury Caravan Park

Overnight stay, staff very helpful. Location was beautiful on the edge of the Yorke Peninsula......watching a family of dolphins with a baby & then a playful seal 100mtrs of the edge of the park. Great brush with nature for the kids.
Amenities are dated but spotless!

Such a beautiful park right on the water
Facilities are clean and well maintained
Bathrooms are spotless
Camp kitchen has everything you need
Staff are really friendly

A week in cabin 1 was the best. Being very new the cabin was very well kitted out with everything you would need.
Excellent location with easterly views & a terrific verandah complete with a WeberQ.
Def worth coming back to.

Very clean & tidy amenities, staff cheerful & friendly.
Will definitely be returning.
Always fantastic and the staff are first class, love staying there regularly.
Fantastic customer service and huge sites at the Oyster Point location. Will be back.
Nice location, very cozy caravan park, very windy, but a nice stay, website could be improved for accuracy of charges, but otherwise great
Great caravan park, grassy sites, right on the beach front, quiet and friendly. Staff were very friendly and helpful. We’ll be back again.
We absolutely loved staying here and we plan to stay here again in the future.
Fabulous spot
Great Caravan Park, great Views. Staff are very helpful and friendly. Loved our time there. We will definately book again! 😃

Thank you for a fabulous weekend. I had a million dollar view. Amenities and camp kitchen were top notch. Cant wait to come back.
Amazing sun rises at my door and dolphins playing .
Good location- lots to do !

Friendly and helpful management team.
Beautiful location right on the beach front.
Amenities were clean and tidy.
Great camp kitchen
Will definately be going there again

Booked in on line without any problems. Our stay at this park was excellent. Our cabin was comfortable, exceptionally clean and well fitted out with crockery, electric frypan, toaster, all required cutlery including a sharp knife for those vegetables and varied cooking utensils. We cannot stress enough on just how clean everything was.

Double bed was comfortable, aircon worked a treat and the TV had all channels complete with Netflix and other programming.

Our cabin was suitable for 6 pax.

Staff were efficient and friendly and ‘on the job’. Our stay was excellent and we highly recommend this park to those who wish to visit the area.
