The perfect location for a summer holiday and a great spot to access all the southern Yorke Peninsula has to offer. Fantastic, clean amenities, friendly staff &  easy access to town shops, pub & takeaway.
Lawn, sand, sea what more could you ask for!
Most enjoyable will definitely stay again if the opportunity arises

Once again stansbury has turned on the good weather for a week long holiday at there beach front park . Great place for family’s  and young kids . The location is awesome . The park is well maintained.  Staff friendly and guest are respectful . We love this town and the caravan park . If you do want a quieter option there oyster point caravan park is for you . Filled with permanent sites and some short term sites . We have stayed at both and depending on who is with us we have enjoyed both .
Very tight park to get your van into. It seems that there are a lot of returning visitors as people seem to just park their boats and cars wherever they want.
Great place to stay its my happy place

Great beach for kids (big kids too!).
Good coffee at Blue Lime Cafe, as well as the best ice cream in the world (Golden North).
Weekend Street market was huge with terrific layout along the Foreshore under the large fig trees.
We will be back.

Love how Leon can put your van on the site for you, no fuss at all as sites when busy are quite tight. Nice level site, lovely grass around & staff were super helpful - also helps the weather was mint!
Great park nice clean facilities

Location is down the road from the main caravan park but for what we required, this suited us. For no power and no water, was not value for money (was peak time I suppose) but on the flipside, the site was roomy, grassy and quiet tucked down the back. Toilet/ shower block was absolutely spotless, always clean and fragrant! Camp kitchen is basic but fit for purpose.
Would definitely stay again! What a find.
I would like to thank ASH & ANITA for being so friendly & Extremely helpful,had a very relaxing holiday Cheers to both of you,See you both in July Darren Sutherland 😁👍👍.

very friendly and clean park the owners are very dedicated to making your holiday a wonderful experience
Location is fantastic

We stayed at an unpowered site at-the pet friendly caravan park. They allotted site numbers this year which was a surprise for us.  We were visiting family. We were in a tent at the roadway entrance therefore copped a lot of wind. Our tent held up in the wind. We were close to the camp which was good. It was a short walk to the shops, pub, beach and front beach.  Ash and Anita were of great assistance during our stay offering to move us but we had a tent and great information. Great stay.
Enjoyed my time at Stansbury Caravan Park. Enjoyed the sea view. Will be back soon.

The caravan park was so clean. The staff in the office were so polite and friendly. The cleaners and the gardeners we also very polite. The DJ on New Years Eve at the park was fantastic and the fireworks at the jetty were great. We have already booked for next year but will be back again during the year.

We stayed at the Oyster Bay Caravan Park on an unpowered site, as the Foreshore was full after New Years. I must say I was pleasantly surprised. The camp kitchen was basic yet all we needed and the toilets and showers were always clean. After driving past the foreshore park, I was actually glad to be at Oyster Bay. Large sites and plenty of room for the kids to enjoy themselves kicking the footy or on the playground. I will definetely be coming back as an annual camp. HUGE shout out to Michelle for returning my call when we were searching for vacancies with no luck and making our family holiday one that we will all remember.

Regular visitor to this park. Highlights are ample clean amenities and well appointed camp kitchen. Can see there are some improvements being made to level out sites. Downside is narrow roads and smaller sites, with the size of vans and the cars that tow them getting bigger it can be a bit tight getting around the roads and difficult getting on site with vehicles overhanging onto roads. A splash park in the town foreshore would be an excellent addition to combat the midday heat when the tide is out, particularly now that the pontoons are gone.
Compared to other modern parks there isn’t a lot for the kids, there are both pros and cons to this but the tariffs are comparable to parks with pools and splash zones etc.
Powered site at oyster point caravan park. Thoroughly enjoyed our stay. Quiet and not crowded. Amenities were great. Will stay there again.
It was really windy during our short stay but I think on a nice day it would be very nice. It’s very popular
Had on site van. Amenities where spotless.. great customer service from reception :)

We came away with our 3 year old, camping in our camper trailer on a powered site.
Excellent location, perfect for young children having everything you need within walking distance. The staff have all been so kind  and helpful.
We'll be back!
Very friendly park, quiet location, grounds net and well maintained,
Love Stansbury caravan park.
We had a Lovely large green lawn site at the front of the oyster caravan park

The campsite is very quiet! Very clean! We were 20 minutes late but the staff waited for us and helped us solve the problems we encountered very patiently! Thank you ☺️ I will come again if I have the chance!
Great location, nice service and beautiful cabin!
Great spot for our caravan right on the foreshore
Always an awesome place to stay, neat , tidy and clean amenities. Friendly staff always welcoming
Friendly reception very informative of area too

Fabulous stay in the caravan park.|The front desk staff were so friendly and helpful. One even came out to pat our dog.|The site we were on was great, large, clean and had a great view.|Staff were available to help move your van in place if needed.|Amenities were fresh and clean.|Plenty of bins and fish cleaning areas.|One of the best G’Day parks we have been to
